brief.goal: Learner self-study inflation workshop: CPI, GDP deflator, household scenarios, and policy communication for first-year economics.

materials.contentPreview: Inflation is the rate at which the general level of prices for goods and services rises, which reduces the purchasing power of money. To measure inflation, econ
